info.title: aglet
info.description: A github label editing tool (aglet) is not only a cap for shoelaces but now also a dotnet tool to edit labels of github repositories

commands.name: copy
commands.description:
Copy labels from one repository to another.
<from-repo> and <to-repo> must be of form
'owner/repoName'

options.name: --source-repo
options.description:
The source repository to copy labels from. Must be of
form 'owner/repoName'

options.name: --target-repo
options.description: The target repository to copy labels to. Must be of

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
Copy labels in interactive mode. Ask for each label
if you want to copy it.

commands.name: create
commands.description:
Create Labels in a repository. Labels can be created
interactively or taken from a json source.

options.name: --json-file
options.description:
Specify a path to a json file containing labels to
create. Must have format
[{name=..,description=..,color=#..},..]

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description:
Use with --target-repo. Don't create labels
interactively, just push all from the file

commands.name: list
commands.description:
List all labels of the repository. <repo> must be of
form 'owner/repoName'

options.name: --auth
options.description:
How to authenticate at Github. token: raw string of a
authentication token. env: name of an environment
variable where your token is stored

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print infortation usefull for debugging aglet
